pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.title: RIP & TEAR
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.disableMainNpc: Disable the NPC as a target in a Called Shot app
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.disableMainNpcTooltip: When attacking the NPC with the Called Shot app, you won't be able to target the main NPC, you could only attack the body parts.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.connectedBodyParts: Body Parts connected to NPC visibility in Called Shot
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.connectedBodyPartsTooltip: The main NPC will be disabled as a target as long as the body parts checked in this list are intact. Only when all of them are destroyed, the main NPC could be targeted.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.regrowthAnyTurn: At the end of any creature's turn
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.regrowthAnyTurnTooltip: If checked, Regrowth occurs at the end of ANY creature's turn in combat. If unchecked, it only occurs at the end of this creature's turn.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.name: Name
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.requiredRollOptions: Only if it has roll options
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.playSfxNoTarget: Play SFX even if there are no targets
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.noLinkedParts: No body parts link to this ability.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.bodyPartsLinkTooltip: Show body parts linked to this ability
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.removeEffectsOnFullHeal: Remove effects only on full heal
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.removeEffectsTooltip: All negative effects and conditions applied by thresholds will only be removed when the body part is fully healed.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.thresholdDamageCardOwnerOnly: You can only use threshold damage card controls for actors you own.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.invalidEffect: Invalid Effect UUID. Must be an Effect item.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.invalidJson: Invalid JSON format for Rule Element
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.lockedEffectChoiceContent: This effect was caused by the damaged body part {partName}. Would you like to heal the body part, manually remove the effect, or cancel?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.abilityDisabled: Cannot use this ability. {partName} is damaged!
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.noSpellcastingFound: No spellcasting entries found on this creature.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.macrosReceiveTooltip: Macros variables: actor, reaction, targets, triggerer
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.acceptedDmgTypesTooltip: If empty, this body part takes ALL damage types. If types are listed, the part ignores any damage that is not one of these types.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.triggerOnDmgTypesTooltip: Empty list means any type triggers.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.ruptureTooltip: If checked, only damage equal to or above the Maximum HP value will destroy this part.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.failedRuptureDealsDmgTooltip: The creature itself takes the amount of damage to this body part, even if it was not enough to Rupture it.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.delayedTriggerTooltip: If checked, the reaction fires after the given delay rather than immediately on death.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.removeDeathReactionPrompt: Are you sure you want to remove this death reaction?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.linkedPartsTooltip: If body parts are listed here, this threshold ONLY activates when ALL of them are also at or below the same HP value.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.dependentBodyPartsHint: The following parts have thresholds that require this part to also be damaged:
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.importErrorBadJson: Could not parse the file. Make sure it is a valid Rip & Tear export.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.importErrorWrongModule: This file does not belong to Rip & Tear.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.importErrorEmpty: The file is empty or missing data.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.tplAutoApply: Apply automatically on NPCs with matching traits
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.tplExistingPrompt: This NPC already has body parts or reactions. Append the template's elements, or replace everything?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.templateNameRequired: Please enter a template name first.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.rewriteTemplateConfirm: Overwrite "{name}" with the current contents above? This cannot be undone.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.manageTemplatesHint: View, edit, export, import, and remove Rip & Tear Templates.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.tplNeedActor: To edit a template element, please open an NPC sheet or select a token first.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.muteManualHpSfx: Mute SFX for manual HP Edits
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.muteManualHpSfxHint: If enabled, manually modifying a body part's HP via sheet inputs will not trigger damage or heal sound effects.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.usePercentageHpHint: Displays body part health as a percentage.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.showAcDifferenceHint: Displays body part AC relative to the creature's base AC (e.g. AC + 2).
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.regrowthTooltip: If enabled, this body part heals automatically at the end of the creature's turn.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.fullHealTooltip: If enabled, the body part fully restores its HP at the end of the turn.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.useHpText: Replace HP numbers with status text
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.hideAcFromPlayers: Hide Body Part AC from Players
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.chatCreatureDamageReport: {actorName} took {amount} damage from a blow to their {partName}.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.promptFreeActionsHint: Ask GM for confirmation before triggering Free Action damage reactions.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.acAdjustmentTooltip: Adjusts the creature's base AC for this body part.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.noValidDamageInRoll: Rip & Tear: No valid damage found in this roll.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.couldNotApplyCalledShotDamage: Rip & Tear: Could not apply this called-shot damage to a body part.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.targetCriticalSuccessNoDamage: Rip & Tear: Target critically succeeded. No damage to apply.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.cannotRollSave: Rip & Tear: This target cannot roll that saving throw.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.rerollSavePrompt: How would you like to reroll?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.deleteBodyPartPrompt: Are you sure you want to remove this body part entirely?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.deleteReactionPrompt: Are you sure you want to remove this damage reaction?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.reactionDisabledManual: Cannot manually trigger a disabled reaction.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.deathReactionDisabledManual: Cannot manually trigger a disabled death reaction.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.triggerReactionPrompt: Are you sure you want to manually trigger the {name} reaction?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.bodyPartIgnoredDamageType: {partName} ignored {amount} {damageType} damage (does not accept this damage type).
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.bodyPartAbsorbedAllHardness: {partName} absorbed all of the damage with Hardness.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.bodyPartAbsorbedSomeHardness: {partName} took {finalAmount} damage (received {preHardnessAmount} damage, absorbed {absorbed} damage with Hardness).
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.bodyPartNotRuptured: {partName} received {amount} damage and was not Ruptured!
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.bodyPartRegenerationDisabled: {partName} took {damageType} damage! Regeneration and Regrowth are disabled.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.removeItemPrompt: Are you sure you want to remove this {itemName}?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.promptTriggerFreeAction: {actorName} took {damageTaken} damage to {sourceText}. Trigger free action {reactionName}?{requirements}
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.promptTriggerDeathReaction: {actorName} has reached 0 HP. Trigger death reaction {reactionName}?
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.reactionRequiresTarget: Reaction "{name}" requires a valid target to apply an effect or condition. No targets found.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.invalidEffectMacroUuid: The provided UUID does not exist, or is not an Effect/Macro.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.regenerationEffectDescription: Heals {amount} HP per turn for {duration} turns.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.regenerationStarted: {partName} is now regenerating {amount} HP per turn for {duration} turns.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.regenerationDisabledEffectDescription: Regrowth, Regeneration, and Fast Healing are disabled.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.reactionUsedEffectDescription: This reaction has been used and cannot be triggered again until the next turn.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.deathReactionUsedEffectDescription: This death reaction has been used.
pf2e-aztecs-rip-n-tear.thresholdScriptFailed: Rip & Tear: threshold script execution failed.
